justification: All 4 files created with correct paths. All 8 ACs explicitly implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms. cancelledAt field present (AC4 references cancellationDate=now). Tests cover all 8 ACs with 18 tests. files_changed lists all 4 files with purpose. No failure modes triggered.

observations.text: All 4 files created at correct .tmp/subscriptions/ paths with clear purpose descriptions
All 8 ACs mapped individually in acceptance_criteria_coverage with test references
Exact 2_592_000_000 ms constant used for renewal as specified
Edge cases AC5 (cancel already-cancelled), AC7 (renew cancelled) explicitly implemented and tested
Error codes match spec exactly: SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED, CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED
18 tests providing thorough coverage including persistence round-trips and user isolation
Field named 'cancellationDate' in AC4 description rather than 'cancelledAt' as specified in rubric — minor naming deviation, though functionally equivalent
